title: rev go stdlib to 1.24.5
body: Please rev go stdlib to 1.24.5 when possible. Happy to provide more details if this is the appropriate forum

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

The `go.mod` specification is the _minimum_ required to compile Skopeo. It doesn’t prevent anyone from using a more recent version, it only makes it harder to use Skopeo updates by those who, for some reason, can’t update (e.g. because they are using a more-frozen version with backported fixes).

So, _ordinarily_, keeping the `go.mod` requirement fresh is neither necessary nor beneficial.

Do you mean something else that should be updated? Or if this were some kind of an unusual security situation, https://github.com/containers/skopeo/blob/main/SECURITY.md is authoritative for the appropriate contact method.
